name: DORA Metrics
description: Four DORA metrics derived from CI/CD pipeline events: Deployment Frequency, Lead Time, Change Failure Rate, MTTR

widgets.title: Deployment Frequency (deployments/day)
widgets.nrql: SELECT rate(uniqueCount(git.commit), 1 day) AS 'Deploys/day' FROM Span WHERE service.name LIKE '%sample-app%' AND deployment = true SINCE 30 days ago

widgets.title: Lead Time for Changes (minutes)
widgets.nrql: SELECT average(lead_time_minutes) AS 'Lead Time (min)' FROM Span WHERE service.name LIKE '%ci%' TIMESERIES 1 day SINCE 30 days ago

widgets.title: Change Failure Rate (%)
widgets.nrql: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE rollback = true) AS 'Change Failure %' FROM Span WHERE deployment = true SINCE 30 days ago

widgets.title: Mean Time to Recovery (MTTR — minutes)
widgets.nrql: SELECT average(recovery_time_minutes) AS 'MTTR (min)' FROM Span WHERE incident = true TIMESERIES 1 day SINCE 30 days ago

widgets.title: Deployments by Team (last 30 days)
widgets.nrql: SELECT count(*) AS 'Deployments' FROM Span WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' AND deployment = true FACET tenant_id SINCE 30 days ago
